Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [SDN]-nat_hash_no_fwd
Description:  This alert is triggered when no forward direction hash entry detected when reverse entry exists is more than 100 in 1 min
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere

Duration: 30 m
